description_long: This is a stylized handgun with a compact, modern design and a striking color scheme dominated by shades of green and gray. The slide features bold, high-contrast graphics, including a green dragon, a skull, and an eagle head, as well as the phrase 'GAME OVER!' in orange block letters. The grip is ergonomically shaped, with a smooth, contoured surface and a matching green color, accented by a dragon motif. The trigger guard is angular and robust, with a geometric cutout that adds a futuristic touch. The barrel is short and squared, with a matte metallic finish and subtle venting or porting details. Overall, the handgun combines functional design with decorative, game-inspired elements, making it visually distinctive and eye-catching.
description: A compact, modern handgun with a green and gray color scheme, bold graphics, and ergonomic grip. Decorative motifs and the phrase 'GAME OVER!' give it a unique, game-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the front, showing the squared barrel opening and the width of the slide, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the green skull graphic on the slide and grip, as well as the angular trigger guard and the overall compact profile.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide and grip, with the magazine base visible and no prominent graphics.
description_view_3: The right side view showcases the eagle head and green dragon graphics, the 'GAME OVER!' inscription, and the ergonomic grip contour.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured with a rounded backstrap and a slightly flared base, providing ergonomic comfort. Its surface appears matte and untextured, with a prominent green dragon graphic as a decorative embellishment. The grip is visually integrated with the trigger guard, and there are no visible finger grooves or checkering, giving it a sleek, modern look. The material resembles polymer, contributing to a lightweight feel. The lower portion of the grip features a matching green color, enhancing the overall visual unity.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is angular and geometric, with a pronounced cutout beneath the trigger area, giving it a futuristic and stylized appearance. It is thick and robust, with straight edges and a squared-off front, lacking any undercuts or additional texturing. The design is visually distinctive, setting it apart from standard rounded trigger guards.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and squared, with a matte metallic finish and subtle porting or venting details near the muzzle. There are no visible threads or compensators, and the profile is compact, matching the overall modern aesthetic of the handgun.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features several bold graphics: a green skull on the left side, a green dragon and the phrase 'GAME OVER!' in orange on the right side, and an eagle head near the front. These markings are large, decorative, and highly visible, contributing to the handgun's unique, game-inspired style.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly flared, with a smooth, rounded contour that blends seamlessly with the grip. There are no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing, and the design is minimalist, focusing on clean lines and ergonomic integration.
